name: Selene
location: Selene in Selene's Web, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you deal Martial melee damage, you call upon a primal spirit that mauls the closest enemy in front of you after 1.3 seconds for 1702 Physical damage. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
